rows.label: qev030606_MSG0010
rows.name:
You sure are strong... It's been
a long time since I've been able
to go all out like this, zo... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030606_MSG0011
rows.name:
...Fwaha! Thanks to you, I've
remembered the days when I used
to run around the battlefield. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030606_MSG0012
rows.name:
To protect my clan, I flew from battlefield
to battlefield, dodged bullets, and struck
down enemy generals one after another, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030606_MSG0013
rows.name:
Hah! But, you know... in the end, I...
couldn't protect my precious family
from those Cavern bastards, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030606_MSG0014
rows.name:
My beloved wife, daughter, and son,
everyone except Bazis was taken down... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030606_MSG0015
rows.name:
After that happened, I grew stronger and honed
my skills to protect everyone, but... in the
end, I was no match for the Growth either. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030606_MSG0016
rows.name:
...I hope Nemard acquires the strength
to properly protect his family. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030606_MSG0018
rows.name:
Well, I'll be heading back first,
zo. The oath ceremony should be
starting soon, after all. [ST:wait ]
